summary: Image Processing Features Testing completed. All 10 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend UI tests passed. The 3 new features (auto-crop, color enhancement, back image AI identification) are implemented and working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions being -1 (width/height). This is a minor cosmetic issue in the dashboard charts.

passed_tests: BACKEND - POST /api/cards/identify endpoint exists and accepts image_base64
BACKEND - POST /api/cards/identify accepts optional back_image_base64 parameter
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory/stats returns all required fields (total_cards, collection_count, for_sale_count, listed)
BACKEND - Stats counts are consistent: total = listed + collection + for_sale
BACKEND - POST /api/inventory processes image through pipeline (auto-crop + enhance + resize)
BACKEND - POST /api/inventory accepts and processes back_image_base64
BACKEND - PUT /api/inventory/{item_id} processes updated image through pipeline
BACKEND - PUT /api/inventory/{item_id} processes updated back_image through pipeline
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory?listed=true returns only listed items
FRONTEND - 4 tabs render: All (2), Collection (0), For Sale (0), Listed (2)
FRONTEND - Add Card form shows Front image upload area with 'AI Auto-Fill' label
FRONTEND - Add Card form shows Back image upload area with 'Better ID' label
FRONTEND - Back image upload has data-testid='back-image-upload-area'
FRONTEND - Front image upload has data-testid='image-upload-area'
FRONTEND - Listed tab hides Select and Add buttons
FRONTEND - Listed tab shows only listed cards with eBay badge
critical_code_review_comments: auto_crop_card function (line 791) uses OpenCV contour detection with multiple strategies for robust card detection
enhance_card_image function (line 933) applies saturation +25%, contrast +15%, sharpness +30%, brightness +5%
process_card_image function (line 969) is the pipeline: crop → enhance → resize to 800px
CardIdentifyRequest model (line 1109) correctly includes optional back_image_base64 field
identify_card_from_image (line 1137) sends both front and back images to AI when back is provided
create_inventory_item (line 3801) uses process_card_image for both front and back images
update_inventory_item (line 3959) uses process_card_image for both front and back images
seed_data_creation: Used existing 2 cards - both now listed on eBay: 1997 Topps Kobe Bryant #171, 2012 Panini Kobe Bryant #97
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image processing features fully tested. Three new features: (1) auto_crop_card - uses OpenCV contour detection to find card and place on black background, (2) enhance_card_image - boosts saturation +25%, contrast +15%, sharpness +30%, (3) Back image AI identification - POST /api/cards/identify accepts back_image_base64 for better card identification. Current inventory: 2 cards total (both listed on eBay). All frontend tabs working. Key data-testid values: image-upload-area (front), back-image-upload-area (back), tab-all, tab-collection, tab-for_sale, tab-listed.
